name: provenance manifest standards_state per-source freshness_at_generation must be in the four-value enum
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && printf '{"standards_state":{"x":{"freshness_at_generation":"made-up"}}}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/validate-consumption-schema.sh" --manifest .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json --check freshness-enum 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_freshness=made-up' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
